= reverse


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.reversed = this.thing.reverse()

# In:  {"thing":"backwards"}
# Out: {"reversed":"sdrawkcab"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root = content().reverse()

# In:  {"thing":"backwards"}
# Out: }"sdrawkcab":"gniht"{
----
